name: Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells transformers, disconnectors, epoxy resin, and silicone composite products in Turkey. It offers oil immersed and epoxy resin current and voltage transformers, disconnectors with and without earthing switches, insulators, components, grading and coupling capacitors, and phase earthing switches. The company also exports its products to 118 countries. Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.
